$comment: Machine-readable model registry. See models/README.md for how to source/convert/quantize each entry, and offline-face-recognition-spec.md §9 and §13 for field-level caveats (exact input size / output dim must be confirmed against whichever specific converted weights you source — placeholders below are the most common published values for each architecture, not guaranteed exact for every export).

models.name: scrfd-tiny

outputs.boxes: bounding boxes [x1,y1,x2,y2] in input-pixel space, per anchor

models.license: REPLACE — verify license of the specific pre-converted weight file you source; SCRFD architecture/training code is Apache-2.0 but redistributed weight files may carry separate terms
models.notes: SCRFD-tiny / SCRFD-500M class detector. 320x320 input chosen for speed on CPU/WASM; the 640x640 variant trades ~2-4x compute for modestly better small-face recall — swap inputSize and re-benchmark per privacy-and-testing.md if small/far faces are a requirement.

models.name: mobilefacenet

outputs.embedding: 192-d float vector (confirm against sourced weights — some public MobileFaceNet exports use 128-d or 512-d; update outputDim and Embedder.ts together if different)

models.license: REPLACE — verify license of the specific pre-converted weight file you source
models.notes: Output must be L2-normalized post-inference (see src/core/Embedder.ts l2Normalize) before storage or comparison. Default cosine-similarity match threshold (0.62, src/core/config.ts) is a placeholder pending empirical tuning against these exact weights.

models.name: antispoof-tiny

outputs.spoofLogit: single scalar; apply sigmoid to obtain real-vs-spoof probability in [0,1] if the export emits a raw logit rather than a post-sigmoid probability — confirm against sourced weights

models.license: REPLACE — verify license of the specific pre-converted weight file you source
models.notes: MobileNetV2-0.25-style binary classification head, real vs. spoof, run on the same aligned 112x112 crop used for embedding. Deterrent-level liveness only — see offline-face-recognition-spec.md §4.4 for explicit limitations. Combined at runtime with the model-free texture heuristic in src/core/LivenessModel.ts (textureHeuristic).
